description: k6 Enterprise — Performance Analytics. Executive KPIs, SLA compliance, anomaly detection, latency percentiles, errors, groups analysis, custom metrics and more.

panels.description: Current number of active virtual users
panels.title: Active VUs

panels.description: HTTP requests per second
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Average p95 response time across all endpoints
panels.title: p95 Response

panels.description: Average p99 response time across all endpoints
panels.title: p99 Response

panels.description: Percentage of failed HTTP requests
panels.title: Error Rate %

panels.description: Percentage of checks passing
panels.title: Check Pass %

panels.description: APDEX score approximation (T=500ms, F=2000ms). Heuristic based on p95/p99 latencies.
panels.title: APDEX Score

targets.expr: clamp_min(clamp_max((1 - clamp_min(max(k6_http_req_duration_p95{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp"}) - 0.5, 0) / 1.5) * 0.5 + (1 - clamp_min(max(k6_http_req_duration_p99{test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp"}) - 0.5, 0) / 4.5) * 0.5, 1), 0) * (1 - avg(k6_http_req_failed_rate{test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp"}))

panels.description: Total iterations completed per second
panels.title: Throughput

panels.description: SLA compliance status for key performance indicators
panels.title: SLA Compliance

panels.description: p95 and p99 latency over time with SLA threshold lines
panels.title: Anomaly Detection — Latency vs SLA

panels.description: Full percentile distribution over time: p50 (median), p90, p95, p99, max
panels.title: Percentiles Over Time

panels.description: Current latency by percentile bucket
panels.title: Latency Distribution

panels.description: HTTP request phase breakdown: blocked, connecting, TLS handshake, sending, waiting (TTFB), receiving
panels.title: Request Phase Breakdown

panels.description: HTTP error rate percentage over time with SLA threshold
panels.title: Error Rate Over Time

panels.description: Check pass rate percentage over time with SLA threshold
panels.title: Check Pass Rate Over Time

panels.description: Per-check breakdown: pass rate for each individual check
panels.title: Per-Check Breakdown

panels.description: Active VUs and max VUs configured over time
panels.title: VUs Over Time

panels.description: Total request rate and error request rate over time
panels.title: Request Rate Over Time

panels.description: Full iteration duration: avg, p95, p99
panels.title: Iteration Duration

panels.description: Data sent and received rates in bytes/sec
panels.title: Data Transfer

panels.description: Connection overhead: blocked, connecting, and TLS handshaking times stacked
panels.title: Connection Overhead

panels.description: p95 response time per k6 group. Auto-discovers all groups in the selected test run.
panels.title: Group Duration — p95 by Group

targets.expr: avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_p95{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

panels.description: Average response time per k6 group.
panels.title: Group Duration — Avg by Group

targets.expr: avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_avg{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

panels.description: Side-by-side percentile comparison for all groups.
panels.title: Group Performance Breakdown

targets.expr: avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_avg{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_p90{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_p95{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

avg by (group)(last_over_time(k6_group_duration_p99{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"}[$__range]))

panels.description: p95 group duration over time, broken down by group.
panels.title: Group Duration Over Time

targets.expr: avg by (group)(k6_group_duration_p95{run_id=~"$run_id", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp", group=~".+"})

panels.description: p95 values for custom Trend metrics (non-built-in). Auto-discovered via __name__ filtering.
panels.title: Custom Trends — p95

panels.description: Custom Counter metrics (non-built-in). Auto-discovered via __name__ filtering.
panels.title: Custom Counters

panels.description: Custom Rate and Gauge metrics (non-built-in). Rates end in _rate, Gauges have no stat suffix.
panels.title: Custom Rates & Gauges

panels.description: Custom Trend metrics (p95) over time.
panels.title: Custom Metrics Over Time

targets.expr: max by (__name__)({run_id=~"$run_id", __name__=~"k6_.+_p95", __name__!~"k6_http_req.*|k6_iteration.*|k6_group_duration.*|k6_browser.*|k6_vus.*|k6_data_.*|k6_checks.*|k6_grpc_.*|k6_ws_.*|k6_http_reqs.*", test_name=~"$test_name", client=~"$client", environment=~"$environment", test_timestamp=~"$test_timestamp"})

title: k6 Enterprise — Performance Analytics
